strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), directly matching the core stack
Proven fullstack range from database to UI, including platform integrations, CRM-adjacent systems, and event-driven architectures relevant to consulting/renovation workflows
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, clean architecture) plus active AI/LLM and MCP tooling work covering the nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Seniority mismatch — candidate presents as Staff/Senior with 15+ years' experience for an entry-level posting
Berlin-based for a role requiring high on-site presence at what appears to be a non-Berlin employer
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience in the resume (MongoDB and MySQL are highlighted instead)

key_factors.factor: Clean architecture, TDD, and platform integration track record

response.justification: The candidate brings exactly the core stack the role requires — TypeScript, React, Node/Nest-compatible backend skills, REST APIs, and relational database familiarity — backed by years of shipping fullstack products and integrating disparate data sources. On top of the must-haves, he covers every nice-to-have: active LLM/MCP work at re:cinq, AWS CDK experience from Optilyz, and Kubernetes deployment from GISCollective. His craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) and demonstrated learning ability across many stacks mean he can ramp quickly on the renovation/energy domain and contribute from day one, with substantial upside as a mentor and force-multiplier on the team.
